nasb.text: but in every nation the man who fears Him and does what is right is welcome to Him.

esv.text: but in every nation anyone who fears him and does what is right is acceptable to him.

cnv.text: 原來在各民族中，凡敬畏他而行義的，都蒙他悅納。

ccb.text: 无论哪一个民族，只要敬畏祂，秉公行义，都会蒙祂接纳。

csbs.text: 原来在各民族中，那敬畏神而行义的人，都是神所悦纳的。
